response.text: {"task_summary": "Research the top 3 open-source vector databases in parallel, compare their GitHub statistics and trade-offs, and deliver a recommendation memo with cited sources", "subtasks": [{"id": "r1", "description": "Research Chroma: gather project facts and positioning with source URLs", "specialist": "research", "required_inputs": [], "expected_output_format": "bullet facts with source URLs", "estimated_complexity": "low", "depends_on": []}, {"id": "r2", "description": "Research Qdrant: gather project facts and positioning with source URLs", "specialist": "research", "required_inputs": [], "expected_output_format": "bullet facts with source URLs", "estimated_complexity": "low", "depends_on": []}, {"id": "r3", "description": "Research Weaviate: gather project facts and positioning with source URLs", "specialist": "research", "required_inputs": [], "expected_output_format": "bullet facts with source URLs", "estimated_complexity": "low", "depends_on": []}, {"id": "a1", "description": "Extract the candidates' GitHub statistics from the demo database and analyze the trade-offs", "specialist": "analysis", "required_inputs": ["research facts"], "expected_output_format": "ranking plus trade-off analysis", "estimated_complexity": "medium", "depends_on": ["r1", "r2", "r3"]}, {"id": "w1", "description": "Write a one-page recommendation memo with cited sources, saved as recommendation.md", "specialist": "writing", "required_inputs": ["research facts", "trade-off analysis"], "expected_output_format": "markdown memo with a Sources section", "estimated_complexity": "medium", "depends_on": ["r1", "r2", "r3", "a1"]}], "confidence": 0.88}
